overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark rural trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path transitions from a narrow fenced corridor to open grassland, passing a small wooden structure. The footage appears to be from a video game engine with synthetic lighting and textures.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a confined dirt path at night. A wooden fence runs along the right side while a stone wall borders the left. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing grass and vegetation on both sides. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated with no other characters or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with distant tree line

events.description: exiting the enclosed path section as the wooden fence and stone wall disappear into open grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open grassy terrain with unobstructed views of the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into wide grassland as the enclosing fence and wall fall away. The path continues through tall grass with a distant tree line visible on the horizon. The night sky becomes fully visible overhead, and the flashlight illuminates the trail ahead through the open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with small wooden structure

events.description: small wooden hut or shrine becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a small wooden structure situated in the open field

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with a pointed roof, possibly a shrine or shed

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open meadow, a small wooden hut appears on the right side of the path. The structure is approached and passed, revealing it to be a simple rustic building or shrine. After passing the hut, the path continues into the expansive dark field with only the distant tree line visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined rural corridor into an expansive, dark meadow. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt path, tightly enclosed by a wooden fence on the right and a stone wall on the left under the focused beam of a flashlight. As the camera moves forward, the enclosing boundaries fall away and the scene opens into wide grassland, revealing a vast night sky and a distant tree line on the horizon. The path then leads the viewer past a small, rustic wooden hut on the right side of the trail before finally continuing deeper into the open, isolated field.
